caption: A person's hands hold a professional sports trading card encased in a clear plastic protective slab. The setting is an indoor space with various boxes of trading cards visible in the background. Across the sequence, the person manipulates the slab, tilting it and shifting their grip to showcase the card inside, which depicts a baseball player in a white and blue uniform. A small inset video in the corner shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap. On-screen graphics include logos and text that read "CASEBREAKS.COM" and "JASMIN". A banner at the bottom of the screen contains the partial word "EBRE". As the sequence progresses, the person rotates the slab and moves it across the frame, highlighting the card's surface and the protective casing.
